title: Steam Next Fest Update
contents_preview: Steam Next Fest has been kind of surreal so far.To be honest, we had no idea how Cat Mail Co. was performing compared to other games in the festival. title: Thank you, cat lovers! Multiplayer demo now live for Steam Next Fest 🐾
contents_preview: Hello fellow cats and cat lovers,First of all… thank you so much.The support we’ve received since announcing Cat Mail Co. has been incredible. Seeing so many of you wishlist the game is honestly a bit crazy to us. We’re truly grateful to all the cat lovers out there who decided to follow the project

title: Cat Mail Co. is coming soon!
contents_preview: Hello fellow cats and cat lovers,We are excited to finally introduce Cat Mail Co., a cozy postal adventure game where you restore a forgotten post office on a quiet island, one package at a time.You arrive at a place left in chaos after the disappearance of the former postman. Parcels are everywhere
